businessBackground: ASX-listed enterprise medical imaging software provider (ASX:M7T). Two core products: **eUnity Enterprise Diagnostic Viewer** (zero-footprint HTML-5 browser-based viewer; FDA-approved including mammography; CE Mark Jan 2026 under EU MDR) and **Vendor Neutral Archive (VNA)** (vendor-agnostic data management platform that ingests imaging across vendors/formats). New **Flamingo modular orchestration architecture** launched at RSNA Nov 2025 — first customer Dec 2025. Recurring SaaS-style revenue model with 75-85% recurring revenue mix.
